project_overview.name: Miso Fix It
project_overview.description: Credit tradeline service marketing, pricing, and interactive qualifier platform.

theme.rationale: Financial services demand authority, clarity, and truth. Using a high-contrast Swiss archetype with crisp whites, deep navy, and electric blue accents provides a premium, trustworthy, energetic feel without resorting to 'fintech-bro dark mode' or generic purples.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous scale. Use p-8, p-12 for containers. Gap-8 to gap-12 for bento grids.
layout_strategy.surfaces: Flat, sharp, solid backgrounds. Use 1px subtle borders (border-border) with very soft shadows (shadow-sm) on interactive cards.
layout_strategy.radii: Subtle roundness, max 8px or 12px. No extreme pill-shapes except for specific badges.
layout_strategy.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense data, center-align hero text.
layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: Density, Data Correlation, Scanability. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. Gap-4 or gap-6.

sections: Hero (Headline, subtitle, primary CTA to Pricing, secondary CTA to Qualifier)
Value Props (Bento grid of benefits: speed, guaranteed posting, trust)

pricing.structure: Split into two main sections or tabs: Individual Tradelines vs Bundles.
pricing.design_note: Highlight the 'Amex Power Pack' with a tracing beam or vibrant colored border and a slightly larger scale.

qualifier_form.layout: Two-column split screen on desktop. Left column: Intake Form. Right column: Sticky Live Credit Factors Dashboard.

live_dashboard.score_gauge: A semi-circular gauge representing the user's input Credit Score. Updates dynamically. Colored ranges for Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent.
live_dashboard.interaction_rule: As the user types into the form fields, the state MUST instantly reflect in the right-hand dashboard. Status dots should compute based on standard industry thresholds (e.g. Utilization < 10% is Excellent, > 30% Needs Work).

component_instructions.forms: Use React Hook Form + Zod + Shadcn Form primitives. Never use native raw inputs.
component_instructions.gauge_chart: Use Recharts `RadialBarChart` configured as a half-circle (startAngle: 180, endAngle: 0) to simulate a TransUnion/Equifax gauge. Display the score prominently in the center.
component_instructions.cards: Use Shadcn Cards without heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px borders. For the 'MOST POPULAR' pricing card, use a glowing or active border.
component_instructions.animations: Framer Motion for page transitions and micro-interactions. The gauge needle or fill should animate smoothly when the user changes the score input.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Every factor card needs an appropriate distinct icon.

hero_background.description: Abstract modern blue wavy background for the hero section. Use with a white/light-gray overlay (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm) to keep text readable.

trust_section.description: Woman holding credit card/phone for the 'How it works' or Trust section.

pricing_highlight.description: Dynamic fluid blue background. Can be used for the Amex Power Pack card background or banner.

checkout_success.description: Credit card on laptop representing secure transaction. For checkout or success page.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, form inputs, submit buttons, and the dashboard gauge/cards MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='credit-score-input'`, `data-testid='live-score-gauge'`).
